title: passerina argentata
parts: Passerina argentata has many medicinal parts, such as the roots, leaves, and flowers. The roots of Passerina argentata are rich in compounds like berberine, which has antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The leaves of this plant are known to contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, which may help in reducing inflammation and oxidative stress. The flowers of Passerina argentata contain alkaloids, such as passerine, which are believed to possess antispasmodic and anticonvulsant properties.
side_effects: Passerina argentata can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems. Ingesting the plant can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while prolonged exposure may lead to liver and kidney damage. Additionally, improper use of the Passerina argentata plant may also trigger headaches, dizziness, and fatigue in some individuals. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using this plant for any health benefits.
